stemHtml: What is the function of the DME Echo Protection Circuit (EPC)?

options.a: To detect if unwanted squitter pulses are interfering with the well-functioning of the interrogator receiver.
options.b: To detect if pulse pairs reflected by the ionosphere are interfering with directly received pulse pairs.
options.c: To protect the interrogator receiver from tracking reflected pulse pairs.
options.d: To protect the transponder receiver from interrogating pulse pairs from other aircraft.
